ToolTreaux 18 Karat Gold Testing Kit Acid Solution, Stone Neutralizer Combo

Easily test the karat content of gold with ToolTreaux’s 18K Gold Testing Kit with Testing Stone and Neutralizer Combo! The kit includes one 0.5oz bottle of gold testing solution, one 0.5oz bottle of neutralizing solution, and one testing stone. The included testing solution is potent, effective and will see you through dozens of tests! Housed in small, sturdy, shatterproof plastic squeeze bottles, the testing solution bottles are easy to maneuver, giving the tester control over the amount of solution used.

Key Features

  • 3
  • Complete Kit
  • GOLD TESTING KIT: Easily test the karat of your gold with ToolTreaux's gold testing solution kits. Kits include one 0.5oz bottle of testing solution, one 0.5oz bottle of neutralizing solution, and one testing stone
  • GOLD TESTING METHOD: Works on any gold; best used on gold that is yet to be smelted due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item
  • EASY USE: Comes with guided instructions; simply place a drop of testing solution on your gold sample deposit and instantly see the results
  • SAFETY FIRT: Included neutralizing solution ensures safe practice and clean up; easily neutralize the harsh chemicals in the testing solution once you are done
  • WARNING: Keep out of reach of children. Exercise extreme caution when opening and using. Proper protective gloves and eyewear are highly recommended. Instruction pamphlet included

Product Specifications

  • Color: Clear

GOLD TESTING METHOD: This gold testing method is best used on gold that is yet to be smelted, due to the harsh nature of the solution that could potentially damage an already finished item. If testing fine jewelry or other finished gold items, be sure to choose an inconspicuous spot, so as not to compromise the finished piece.

INSTRUCTIONS: To test gold karat content, scratch the item onto the test stone leaving a visible deposit. Place a small drop of solution on top of the deposit; if the gold is the same karat or higher, the solution will not affect the deposit. If the deposit is of a lower karat, the deposit will dissolve and eventually disappear. When done, add an equal amount of neutralizing solution to neutralize the old solution. Ensure gold testing stone has been thoroughly washed and neutralized before starting any more testing!

PLEASE NOTE: Testing solutions can be harmful to the skin. Please exercise the utmost caution when opening and using this product and method of testing! Proper protective eye wear and gloves are highly recommended, as the solution can burn unprotected skin. Ensure neutralization of the testing solution after every test by using the neutralizing solution. Read the label on the bottle and follow provided instructions.
